description: Export a video clip from the Nx Witness VMS based on the Case ID, Camera Name, and timestamps found in '~/incident_ticket.json'. Save the exported footage as an MKV file to '~/evidence/case_<case_id>.mkv' and generate a SHA-256 checksum saved to '~/evidence/case_<case_id>.mkv.sha256' for chain of custody. Access the Nx Witness Web Admin at https://localhost:7001 (admin/Admin1234!) or use the API (documentation at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html#/developers).
